notes: Mistral B19 + HTTP 400 error strategy test: FAILED. The APF response status is still HTTP 200, not the intended 400. The HTTP 400 strategy was supposed to trigger TRPCClientError with error.message displayed as toast/alert, but the APF build appears to still be returning 200 status. Same BLOCKED_MUTATION_ERROR pattern as #273-277 (6th consecutive failure). The tRPC client receives 200 + malformed superjson body → deserialization fails → silent mutation error → page resets. No toast, no alert, no visible error message. 4 messages left unchanged. Either: (1) the B19 build was not updated with HTTP 400 logic, or (2) Etap's HTTP/2 proxy layer forces 200 status regardless of upstream configuration.
